ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" REAL /* End time of the event */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition under which the event occurred */,
  "event_num" INTEGER /* Number of occurrences of the event */,
  "event_id_ref" INTEGER /* Reference ID for the event (used to track related events) */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event occurred */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the event */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the event */,
  "resolution_time" REAL /* Time taken to resolve the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the condition (e.g., 1 for low, 5 for critical) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the condition */,
  "threshold_min" REAL /* Minimum threshold for the condition */,
  "threshold_max" REAL /* Maximum threshold for the condition */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last time the condition was checked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "impact_category" TEXT /* Category of the event impact (e.g., operational, safety) */,
  "criticality" INTEGER /* Criticality level of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the machine */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the machine (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the machine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the machine */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the machine was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_due_date" TEXT /* Next calibration due date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being logged */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., start, end, update) */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Details of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_machines" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "start_timestamp" TEXT /* Start timestamp of the event on the machine */,
  "end_timestamp" TEXT /* End timestamp of the event on the machine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_machines_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES event_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Next maintenance due date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact assessment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being assessed */,
  "impact_level" INTEGER /* Impact level (e.g., 1 for low, 5 for critical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions to mitigate the impact */,
  "assessment_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the impact assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_assessments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_assessments_assessment_by FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
